issues.detail: The skill contains verbose explanations that could be condensed.

scenarios.name: PHI encryption at rest + audit log
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for Fernet (AES-128-CBC) and a minimal log dict, missing AES-256-GCM, KMS guidance, the patient_id/ip/success/hash audit fields, and the 6-year retention rule; treatment uses AESGCM with 12-byte nonces, names KMS/Vault for keys, and emits the full audit entry with SHA-256 tamper hash.

scenarios.name: Pre-BAA HIPAA hardening checklist
scenarios.rationale: Baseline lists generic best practices without HIPAA-specific thresholds; treatment specifies TLS 1.2+/HSTS, 15-minute idle timeout, 60-day breach notification to individuals and HHS, 500-person media trigger, and calls out services not BAA-covered.
